name: dogfu
description: Sales toolkit on the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Scout → checkpoint → Deep dive → CRM — the user makes the pursue-or-drop call off a succinct brief; each lead the user acts on lands in Close — Qualified or Bad Fit — with structured company attributes), lead-touch (work leads in Close from cold outreach cadence through live deals — opportunities — to close), lead-worklist (read-only cross-phase worklist — the prioritized leads to work now, across all stages, with context), crm-cleanup (read-only CRM health audit), first-audit (publish a first-touch SEO/AEO prospect audit and record it on the lead), and narrative-audit (a standalone brand category & narrative-coherence check on a domain), plus berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral.
